summary.danger_one: {{count}} danger flag detected — review carefully before signing.
summary.danger_other: {{count}} danger flags detected — review carefully before signing.
summary.critical_one: {{count}} critical flag detected — do not sign unless you are certain.
summary.critical_other: {{count}} critical flags detected — do not sign unless you are certain.

unlimited_approval.title: Unlimited token approval
unlimited_approval.description: This transaction grants the spender unlimited permission to move your tokens. If the spender contract is ever compromised, your full balance is at risk. Prefer approving only the exact amount you intend to spend.

unverified_contract.title: Unverified contract
unverified_contract.description: The contract source code is not verified on the block explorer. Clarity cannot confirm what this contract does. Review the project carefully before signing.

known_phishing.title: Known phishing
known_phishing.description: This transaction interacts with an address flagged as phishing. Do not sign — your funds will be stolen.

suspicious_counterparty.title: Suspicious counterparty
suspicious_counterparty.description: The contract on the other side of this transaction matches patterns associated with fraud. Proceed only if you are certain of its legitimacy.

high_slippage.title: High slippage
high_slippage.description: This swap allows more than 5% slippage. You may receive significantly fewer tokens than the quoted amount.

unusual_gas_price.title: Unusual gas price
unusual_gas_price.description: The gas price on this transaction is far above the current network norm. You may overpay for inclusion.

first_interaction.title: First interaction
first_interaction.description: You have never interacted with this address before. Double-check it is the one you intended.

contract_proxy_mismatch.title: Proxy mismatch
contract_proxy_mismatch.description: This contract is a proxy whose implementation differs from what its interface suggests. The actual logic executed may not match what you expect.

sanctioned_address.title: Sanctioned address
sanctioned_address.description: The recipient of this transaction is on a sanctions list. Interacting may violate local law.

summary.erc721_approve_all: Collection-wide NFT approval to operator on {{to}}

ui.tagline: Understand what you're signing — in your language.

onboarding.intro: I'll guide you through your first steps. No jargon, no skipping safety.

path.has_wallet: I have a wallet but no experience
path.active: I'm active, show me what I'm missing
